features.description: Database, performance tuning, and API modularization
steps: Optimized SQLite Engine (MaxOpenConns, FTS5 trigram search, TTL caching)
Network & Load optimizations (Gzip compression, Cache-Control headers)
Domain-Driven Handlers (admin, auth, listing, common modules)
Registrar Assembly for standardized dependency injection

features.description: Optimizing long-running tasks and CLI benchmarks
steps: Warm-up the benchmark CLI constraint
Configurable Slow-Query Thresholds (SLOW_QUERY_THRESHOLD_MS)
Progress Output for stress Generation
Parallelize GenerateStressListings
CSP, CSRF, HSTS, structural logging, strict request rate limiting
Scrub History (remove tracked test artifacts)
Prevent Future Leaks (Secret Scanner in pre-commit)

features.description: Manage user authentication flow and secure cookies
steps: Fix OAuth State Cookie SameSite Policy (SameSiteLaxMode)
Enforce StrictMode on Authenticated Sessions

features.description: Global Theme Rollout & Design System Refinement to Earth theme
steps: Design System Update (tailwind.config.js & base.html)
Integrate Earth color palette (earth-dark, earth-cream, earth-accent)
Typography: Apply Inter and Playfair Display fonts globally
Dark Theme on profile.html, about.html, error.html
Standardize Button & Tag Components (bg-earth-accent CTA, sharp edges)
Create a Reusable Modal Shell (modal_base)
Refactor modal_create_listing.html (Dark/Frosted wrapper, transparent inputs)
Refactor modal_edit_listing.html (Pending styling update to dark theme)
Dark Theme on modal_create_request, modal_detail, modal_profile, modal_feedback (Pending)
Global Micro-Animations (active:scale-95, hover:scale-105, transition-duration-300) (Pending)
Bulk Upload Feature (CSV) inside Admin
Admin Users View implementations
Dark Theme on Admin Dashboard & metric cards (Pending)
Dark Theme on Admin Listings, Admin Users, Admin Login, Admin Delete (Pending)

features.description: Core application capabilities and user workflows
steps: Implement Claim Ownership Logic
Polish Claim Ownership UI
Ensure Service type is featured on homepage
Unify Status Badges in listing cards

features.description: Comprehensive test metric improvements and testing tools
steps: Scaffold Go-based CLI testing harness (api-spec, cli-drift)
Establish >90% system-wide baseline coverage
Phase 1: Fix critical coverage gaps in security-audit main functions, ratelimit, session, and SQLite (Priority 1) (Pending)
Phase 2: Fix gap in configuration validation and domain validation tests (Priority 2) (Pending)
Phase 3: Additional mock and infrastructure testing (Priority 3) (Pending)

features.description: Reducing duplication and streamlining API handlers
steps: Pagination Helper & Standardization
Error Handling Standardization
Route Grouping (Complete/Standardize public vs auth boundaries) (Partial)
Add Response Helpers (RenderSuccess, JSONSuccess, ErrorResponse) (Pending)
Create Base Handler Struct to reduce session access duplication (Pending)
Service Layer Consolidation & Validation Middleware (Pending)

features.description: Verified all public, user, and admin routes are accessible and functional via the UI
steps: Verified Public Routes (Home, About, Search, Listing Details, OAuth)
Verified User Routes (Profile, Create/Edit/Delete/Claim listing workflows, Feedback, Session Management)
Verified Admin Routes (Dashboard, User & Listing Management, Moderation workflows, Bulk Actions, Bulk Upload)
Bug Fix: Allowed unauthenticated access to Admin Login routes
Bug Fix: Relaxed Client Form URL Validation and added backend normalizer

features.description: Continuous integration, vulnerability scanning, and build workflows
steps: Moved from Tailwind CDN to Tailwind CLI build step
govulncheck and docker scout integrated into CI pipeline
Deploy to Fly.io configured

features.description: Refactoring features into dedicated services and domain packages
steps: Refactored Image Upload to dedicated ImageService
Added Hours of Operation for Business/Food categorization
Decoupled AuthMiddleware from AuthHandler for modularity
Extracted date parsing to domain package for strict correctness

features.description: Features and architectural improvements planned for the next phase
steps: Auth Expansion: Add Apple/Facebook login platforms (Requires developer accounts)
DevLogin Hardening: Hardcode claim workflow instead of skipping it
Admin Customization: Enable dynamic color/font config from the dashboard
Expiration Ticker: Background service to deactivate expired listings
Dedicated Location Filter (filterLocation string parameter)
Browser Test Expansion: Verify 'Create Listing' flow via subagent
Security Monitoring: Track & patch CVE-2025-60876 in alpine:latest
Fat Handler Refactoring: Use structural tags and validation libraries

features.description: Comprehensive security audit fixes and defense-in-depth improvements
steps: Enforced ADMIN_CODE requirement for production startup
Added 5 req/min rate limit to /admin/login POST
Moved all template inline scripts to external JS for strict CSP
Replaced inline onclick with HTMX hx-on event handlers
Self-hosted Chart.js and htmx locally to remove CDN dependencies
Verified SQL Injection (parameterized queries) and CSRF protection
Verified Session security (Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite=Strict)
Pending: Consider self-hosting Tailwind CSS for admin_login.html (Minor)

features.description: Comprehensive mapping of application routes and workflows for all user personas
steps: Unauthenticated Visitor Journey (Landing, Discovery, Deep Dive, About, OAuth onboarding)
Authenticated Standard User Journey (Profile Management, Listing Creation/Edit/Claim, Feedback, Logout)
Administrator Journey (Admin Login, Dashboard, User Directory, Content Moderation, Bulk Upload)
CLI Command Line Journey (Listing Management, Admin Operations, Server/Database Management)
